Objective To explore the character of clinic, EEG , histology and neuroradiology on hemimegalencephaly with intractable epilepsy, and to value the effect of hemispherectomy for hemimegalencephaly.
"We are shifting the nature of health care from maximally invasive to minimally invasive therapies, " says Joshua Hirsch, director of interventional neuroradiology at Massachusetts General Hospital.
